description: Track any parcel by tracking number — real-time status, event history, and carrier detection.

lifecycle.reason: Missing required package metadata (runtimeHint or identifier)

name: io.github.ship24-official/ship24-tracking

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable the per-shipment Trackers endpoint (for per-shipment plan subscribers)
environmentVariables.name: PLAN_PER_SHIPMENT

environmentVariables.description: Set to 'true' to enable the per-call Tracking Search endpoint (for per-call plan subscribers)
environmentVariables.name: PLAN_PER_CALL

environmentVariables.description: Override the Ship24 API base URL (default: https://api.ship24.com/public/v1)
environmentVariables.name: SHIP24_BASE_URL

environmentVariables.description: How long to cache the couriers list in hours (default: 24)
environmentVariables.name: COURIERS_CACHE_TTL_HOURS
